14.reason: [Missing newline character: When reading lines with Scanner.nextLine(), the newline character '\n' is not included. This causes the lexer to lose line break information, making it impossible to correctly track line numbers and handle newline-dependent logic.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing newline character: When reading lines with Scanner.nextLine(), the newline character '\n' is not included. This causes the lexer to lose line break information, making it impossible to correctly track line numbers and handle newline-dependent logic.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The newline character is not appended, so the input string loses line break information, causing curLine to not increment correctly and the lexer to fail to detect line numbers properly.]
reasons.buggy-claude-sonnet-4-6-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  '\n' is never appended after each line, so all lines are concatenated into one string. This destroys line number tracking — curLine will never increment correctly, causing wrong line numbers in error output.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: This line does not add a newline character, so all lines are concatenated into one. The lexer relies on newline characters to track line numbers, causing all tokens to be reported on line 1, and error line numbers will be incorrect.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  scanner.nextLine() strips the newline character, causing all lines to be concatenated into a single string. This prevents the lexer from correctly tracking line numbers and terminating single-line comments.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Newline characters are stripped, breaking line number tracking and single-line comment detection

395.reason: 此处创建了token对象但未添加到tokens列表中，导致语法分析时缺失该token

reasons.buggy-claude-sonnet-4-6-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  The DIV token is created but never added to the tokens list — tokens.add(tok) is missing. Division operators will be silently dropped from output.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  此处创建了token对象但未添加到tokens列表中，导致语法分析时缺失该token
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Token object is created but never added to the tokens list, causing '/' to be omitted from output

242.reason: When curChar is not '=', the already-read next character is not retracted. Unlike the '=', '<', '>' branches which call retract() before creating their single-char token, this branch silently consumes the lookahead character, causing the next token to be mis-parsed.

reasons.buggy-claude-sonnet-4-6-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  When curChar is not '=', the already-read next character is not retracted. Unlike the '=', '<', '>' branches which call retract() before creating their single-char token, this branch silently consumes the lookahead character, causing the next token to be mis-parsed.

250.reason: [After detecting a single '&', the lexer should not continue recursive lexical analysis via next(), as it may skip necessary error handling or cause infinite recursion; also, the current token (single '&') is not consumed as an error properly and no token is emitted, but control flow proceeds incorrectly.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [After detecting a single '&', the lexer should not continue recursive lexical analysis via next(), as it may skip necessary error handling or cause infinite recursion; also, the current token (single '&') is not consumed as an error properly and no token is emitted, but control flow proceeds incorrectly.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Recursive call to next() inside next() can cause unexpected control flow and may lead to infinite recursion or missed error reporting]

272.reason: [Same issue as with '&': after recording the error for a single '|', calling next() recursively here disrupts the main lex loop, potentially causing missed characters, duplicated error reports, or incorrect state management. Lexical analysis should proceed linearly without recursive calls to next() in error branches.]
